# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: [linux, windows, macos]
        arch: [amd64, arm64]
        exclude:
          - platform: windows
            arch: arm64
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          npm install -g pkg

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build
          
      - name: Compile binaries
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/binaries
          if [ "${{ matrix.platform }}" = "linux" ]; then
            pkg . --targets node18-linux-${{ matrix.arch }} --output dist/binaries/app-linux-${{ matrix.arch }}
          elif [ "${{ matrix.platform }}" = "windows" ]; then
            pkg . --targets node18-win-${{ matrix.arch }} --output dist/binaries/app-windows-${{ matrix.arch }}.exe
          elif [ "${{ matrix.platform }}" = "macos" ]; then
            pkg . --targets node18-macos-${{ matrix.arch }} --output dist/binaries/app-macos-${{ matrix.arch }}
          fi

      - name: Prepare configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/config
          cp -r config/* dist/config/ || echo "No config directory found"
          cp .env.example dist/config/.env.example || echo "No .env.example found"
          echo "BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" > dist/config/build-info.txt
          echo "BUILD_NUMBER=${{ github.run_number }}" >> dist/config/build-info.txt
          echo "GIT_COMMIT=${{ github.sha }}" >> dist/config/build-info.txt
          echo "GIT_BRANCH=${{ github.ref_name }}" >> dist/config/build-info.txt
          echo "PLATFORM=${{ matrix.platform }}" >> dist/config/build-info.txt
          echo "ARCHITECTURE=${{ matrix.arch }}" >> dist/config/build-info.txt

      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/scripts
          cp -r scripts/deploy/* dist/scripts/ || echo "No deploy scripts found"
          cat > dist/scripts/install.sh <<'EOF'
          #!/bin/bash
          echo "Installing application..."
          chmod +x app-*
          sudo mv app-* /usr/local/bin/
          echo "Installation complete!"
          EOF
          chmod +x dist/scripts/install.sh
          
          cat > dist/scripts/install.bat <<'EOF'
          @echo off
          echo Installing application...
          copy app-*.exe C:\Program Files\MyApp\
          echo Installation complete!
          EOF

      - name: Create README
        run: |
          cat > dist/README.md <<EOF
          # Build Artifacts
          
          **Build Information:**
          - Build Number: ${{ github.run_number }}
          - Git Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
          - Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          - Platform: ${{ matrix.platform }}
          - Architecture: ${{ matrix.arch }}
          - Build Date: $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')
          
          **Contents:**
          - \`binaries/\` - Compiled application binaries
          - \`config/\` - Configuration files and templates
          - \`scripts/\` - Deployment and installation scripts
          
          **Installation:**
          See scripts/install.sh (Linux/macOS) or scripts/install.bat (Windows)
          
          **Documentation:**
          Visit https://github.com/${{ github.repository }} for full documentation
          EOF

      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd dist
          find . -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums.txt

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: |
            dist/binaries/
            dist/config/
            dist/scripts/
            dist/README.md
            dist/checksums.txt
          retention-days: 90
          if-no-files-found: error

  package-all:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Download all artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: all-builds

      - name: Create unified package
        run: |
          mkdir -p unified-package
          cp -r all-builds/build-*/* unified-package/
          
          cat > unified-package/RELEASE_NOTES.md <<EOF
          # Release Notes
          
          **Build:** #${{ github.run_number }}
          **Commit:** ${{ github.sha }}
          **Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}
          **Date:** $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')
          
          ## Included Platforms
          - Linux (amd64, arm64)
          - Windows (amd64)
          - macOS (amd64, arm64)
          
          ## Changes
          See commit history at: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/commit/${{ github.sha }}
          EOF

      - name: Create archive
        run: |
          cd unified-package
          tar -czf ../complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz .
          cd ..
          zip -r complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}.zip unified-package/

      - name: Upload unified package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: |
            complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz
            complete-build-${{ github.run_number }}.zip
          retention-days: 90

  notify:
    needs: [build, package-all]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Build notification
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" = "success" ] && [ "${{ needs.package-all.result }}" = "success" ]; then
            echo "Build completed successfully!"
            echo "Artifacts are available for download"
            echo "Build number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          else
            echo "Build failed or was cancelled"
          fi
